imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 minimalist cosplay outfit catalog page featuring adult original anime-style woman, 24, confident playful expression, pointing upward and starlight ranger costume with navy cropped jacket, silver belt, opaque leggings, boots, small cape. Subject: adult original anime-style woman, 24, confident playful expression, pointing upward appears in a clean fashion-editorial pose while starlight ranger costume with navy cropped jacket, silver belt, opaque leggings, boots, small cape is broken into readable outfit components and catalog details. Scene: Pure white photography studio background with generous white space at top and bottom, bright high-key soft lighting, clean fashion-blogger energy, and premium cosplay information-page design. Composition: Fixed 9:16 layout: upper figure area with confident playful pose, clean lightbulb or idea icon when useful, left or side product cutout grid from left-side flat catalog grid: jacket 1x, belt 1x, boots 1x, cape 1x, gloves 1x, clear outfit information hierarchy, and extra bottom breathing room for a premium editorial feel. Signature Elements: adult original anime-style woman, 24, confident playful expression, pointing upward, starlight ranger costume with navy cropped jacket, silver belt, opaque leggings, boots, small cape, left-side flat catalog grid: jacket 1x, belt 1x, boots 1x, cape 1x, gloves 1x, pure white studio, confident pointer or idea pose, minimalist outfit catalog grid, premium bottom whitespace, and clean cosplay styling. Style: Realistic commercial fashion photography mixed with minimalist cosplay outfit catalog design, clean editorial spacing, polished short-video opening energy, and not a chaotic costume collage. Color Palette: Pure white studio base, outfit-specific accent colors from starlight ranger costume with navy cropped jacket, silver belt, opaque leggings, boots, small cape, crisp dark text, soft gray dividers, and clean high-key highlights. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Slight overhead close-to-half-body fashion camera when showing the person, with product grid kept flat, clear, and catalog-like. Typography: Use short readable catalog labels for each outfit component in left-side flat catalog grid: jacket 1x, belt 1x, boots 1x, cape 1x, gloves 1x; keep text minimal, aligned, and not decorative filler. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
